version.note:
Update System Enabled

New

  • Added Joomla Update Server support
  • Automatic updates via Joomla Extensions Update system

Improvements

  • Improved installation and upgrade workflow
  • Improved package manifest structure
  • Better version consistency across package and extensions

Fixes

  • Minor internal fixes for package handling

Note: Users on version 1.1.1 need to install this update manually once. After that, updates will work automatically via Joomla.

Initial Public Release

Features

  • Snippets system for safe HTML / iframe insertion
  • Code Snippets with line numbers and copy button
  • DevArt Source for trusted raw embeds
  • Lightweight Social Share buttons (no SDK)
  • Automatic Open Graph integration

Architecture

  • Modular Joomla 6 component + plugins package
  • Centralized configuration panel
  • Editor button integrations

Performance

  • No external libraries or SDK dependencies
  • Optional caching for snippets and code snippets
  • Optimized for high-traffic environments

Security

  • No script execution in Snippets or Code Snippets
  • Raw code isolated in DevArt Source
  • ACL and CSRF protection
  • Safe database handling

Improvements

  • Improved cache handling stability
  • Improved dashboard status reporting
  • Improved uninstall behavior with data persistence options
  • Added logging support for debugging
